description: You are the head of wardrobe for a major regional theater company, converting a leased open-plan villa into a dedicated costume production workshop. The building shell is open with all furniture removed. Design a layout with four functional zones: 'Cutting Room', 'Sewing Area', 'Fitting Room', and 'Wardrobe Storage'. Create partition walls to enclose the Fitting Room and Wardrobe Storage, and define and name all four rooms so they are explicitly labeled on the plan. Furnish the workspace with at least 8 tables/desks, 8 task chairs/stools, and 8 large storage units (shelves/cabinets/wardrobes). Furnish the Fitting Room with at least 1 mirror and 2 armchairs or sofas. Draw at least 2 dimension lines around the large cutting tables to annotate clearances. Save the project when complete.
